query: (carbon dioxide[TIAB] OR CO2[TIAB]) AND ("decision making"[TIAB] OR "decision-making"[TIAB]) AND (indoor[TIAB] OR office[TIAB])
top_results: PMID 40585557 (Lancet RH 2025 Boston schools); 39488222 (Lancet Countdown — wrong topic); 41460748 (façade monitoring — wrong)
notes: Tight + relevant. Boston schools paper uses "decision tools" framing — direct hit for decision-quality cluster.

query: ("Strategic Management Simulation"[TIAB] OR SMS[TIAB]) AND (CO2[TIAB] OR "carbon dioxide"[TIAB])
top_results: Mostly false positives on SMS=Short Message Service or surgical mask studies. Real hits: Satish 2012 family + Allen 2016 + Scully 2019 (already in corpus).
notes: SMS as bare token has terrible recall. Replace with "Strategic Management Simulation" only — see Q02b in question_set.

query: (CO2[TIAB] OR "carbon dioxide"[TIAB]) AND (cognitive[TIAB] OR cognition[TIAB]) AND ppm[TIAB]
top_results: PMID 42035679 (2026 IJHEH multi-factor); 41601028 (2026 EEG study); 41020138 (Shimazaki taxi drivers — in corpus); 37996033 (2024 STOTEN drivers); 33630672 (HDT bedrest +CO2)
notes: Best precision query in the batch. "ppm" filter cuts noise effectively because only intervention/exposure papers report ppm.

query: ("indoor air quality"[TIAB] OR IAQ[TIAB]) AND ("decision quality"[TIAB] OR "decision making"[TIAB])
top_results: PMID 40585557 (Boston schools); 38730039 (low-cost sensors wildfire — wrong); 38203010 (SchoolAIR IoT — wrong); 37932665 (school decision-makers — wrong)
notes: "decision making" matched "decision-makers" (administrative). Need to switch to "decision-making performance" or "decision quality" exclusively.

query: (PM2.5[TIAB] OR "particulate matter"[TIAB]) AND ("cognitive performance"[TIAB] OR "cognitive function"[TIAB]) AND (indoor[TIAB] OR office[TIAB])
top_results: PMID 41512775 (2026 China quasi-experimental); 39608295 (residential MCI middle-aged adults); rest are clinical contexts.
notes: Cluster C2 is harder — most PM2.5/cognition lit is outdoor/long-term. "Indoor + office" filter trims to the target population.

query: ("air pollution"[TIAB]) AND (chess[TIAB] OR "decision quality"[TIAB] OR "decision-making"[TIAB]) AND (cognitive[TIAB] OR performance[TIAB])
top_results: PMID 41966237 + 41708654 hits are not chess papers; Künn 2019 (chess + air quality) is on SSRN/IZA, not PubMed-indexed.
notes: Anchor finding (Künn et al. chess) is grey lit (IZA DP 12632) — PubMed cannot reach it. Lesson: for economics-side IAQ work, must run Google Scholar or RePEc.

query: ("ventilation rate"[TIAB] OR "outdoor air"[TIAB]) AND ("cognitive function"[TIAB] OR productivity[TIAB]) AND (office[TIAB] OR worker*[TIAB])
top_results: PMID 26593933 (MacNaughton 2015 — in corpus); 26502459 (Allen 2016 — in corpus); 25822504 (energy/ventilation tropical office); 21470313 (Fisk IEQ benefits).
notes: Returns the canonical ventilation × productivity stream. Nothing newer than 2019 — query needs date-limit relaxation or different vocab to find recent work.

query: (classroom[TIAB] OR school[TIAB]) AND (ventilation[TIAB] OR "CO2"[TIAB]) AND (cognitive[TIAB] OR learning[TIAB] OR attention[TIAB])
top_results: Too broad; many wildfire/COVID-airborne-transmission papers. Real hits: 40585557 (Boston schools); 40204887 (university students ventilation increase).
notes: Need MeSH narrowing: add AND "Schools"[Mesh] AND ("Cognition"[Mesh] OR "Attention"[Mesh]). Will refine in Phase 2.

query: ("indoor environmental quality"[TIAB] OR IEQ[TIAB] OR "green building"[TIAB]) AND (cognitive[TIAB] OR cognition[TIAB])
top_results: PMID 41869617 (EEG productivity 2026); 41957074 (heat-stress + risk-taking 2026); 41601028 (CO2 + temperature EEG)
notes: Strong cluster-overlap signal — IEQ studies often span CO2 + thermal + light → useful for C4 but also re-confirms C1.

query: ("thermal comfort"[TIAB] OR "indoor temperature"[TIAB]) AND ("cognitive performance"[TIAB] OR productivity[TIAB] OR "decision making"[TIAB])
top_results: Same EEG/IEQ papers above; rest are HVAC engineering or clinical heat exposure. Useful: 41957074 (heat-stress affective + risk-taking).
notes: Broad. Limit by AND "Office"[TIAB] OR "worker*"[TIAB] for next pass.

query: (Stroop[TIAB]) AND (CO2[TIAB] OR ventilation[TIAB] OR "indoor air"[TIAB])
top_results: PMID 41601028 (EEG CO2/temp); 40204887 (ventilation × Stroop); plus several clinical neuro papers using Stroop unrelated to IAQ.
notes: Stroop is the de facto attention DV in this lit — useful test-instrument anchor query.

query: (drowsiness[TIAB] OR sleepiness[TIAB] OR fatigue[TIAB]) AND (CO2[TIAB] OR "carbon dioxide"[TIAB]) AND (office[TIAB] OR indoor[TIAB])
top_results: PMID 41140948 (sick building syndrome Malaysian banks 2025); 33940416 (mechanical ventilation longitudinal field study).
notes: Useful for "CO2 → drowsiness → degraded decision" mediation literature; complements C1.

query: (Satish U[Author] OR Allen JG[Author] OR MacNaughton P[Author] OR Wargocki P[Author]) AND (CO2[TIAB] OR "carbon dioxide"[TIAB] OR ventilation[TIAB])
top_results: Author-anchor query — recovers all canonical Satish/Allen/MacNaughton/Wargocki CO2-cognition papers. Many are off-topic for these prolific authors.
notes: Author-anchor queries are the highest-precision route to the canonical literature. Will be a Phase 4 scale-up workhorse.

query: ("crossover trial"[TIAB] OR "randomized"[TIAB] OR RCT[TIAB]) AND (CO2[TIAB] OR "carbon dioxide"[TIAB]) AND (cognitive[TIAB] OR cognition[TIAB])
top_results: PMID 42035679 (2026 IJHEH); 41601028 (2026 EEG); 41810527 (CO2 7.5% inhalation challenge study, anxiety, OFF-topic); 36370817 (aircraft cabin RCT 2023).
notes: Methodology-anchored query catches the high-internal-validity studies. Anxiety-induction CO2 inhalation studies (7.5% breathing challenge) are off-topic but recur — exclude with NOT (panic OR anxiety OR "breathing challenge").

query: (driving[TIAB] OR driver[TIAB] OR cabin[TIAB]) AND (CO2[TIAB] OR "carbon dioxide"[TIAB]) AND (cognitive[TIAB] OR alertness[TIAB] OR performance[TIAB])
top_results: Too broad — mostly aircraft and medical anesthesia. Real hits: 41020138 (Shimazaki 2025); 37996033 (Sci Total Environ 2024); 36370817 (aircraft cabin RCT).
notes: Add AND "indoor air"[TIAB] OR "cabin air"[TIAB] to remove anesthesia/anesthetic and respiratory medicine noise.

query: (submarine[TIAB] OR "space station"[TIAB] OR astronaut[TIAB]) AND (CO2[TIAB] OR "carbon dioxide"[TIAB]) AND (cognitive[TIAB] OR decision[TIAB])
top_results: PMID 41253359 (2025 review); 33630672 (HDT bedrest 2021); 33296611 (sensorimotor); 34512371 (HDT cognitive-motor).
notes: Closed-environment studies are the dose-response high-end (CO2 0.5–1.2%). Useful boundary on the threshold question.

query: ("meta-analysis"[Title] OR "systematic review"[Title]) AND (CO2[TIAB] OR "indoor air"[TIAB]) AND (cognitive[TIAB] OR cognition[TIAB])
top_results: PMID 37107857 (Meta-Analysis Ventilation × Intellectual Productivity 2023); 38413202 (Solid fuels + cognitive impairment SR/MA); 36767121 (school IEQ interventions SR).
notes: Meta/SR query is the highest-leverage entry point for any new student — gives a scaffold of effect sizes + reference lists.

query: What is the lowest indoor CO₂ concentration at which adult decision-making performance has been shown to decline in randomized controlled chamber studies?
top_results: User to execute via elicit.com — paste top 10 results back into this row.
notes: Elicit's structured-extraction view should pull SMS scale + ppm threshold per paper into a comparison table — that table is itself a deliverable for the corpus.

query: Do studies using the Strategic Management Simulation replicate decision-making decrements at 1000 ppm CO₂ across populations beyond Satish 2012?
top_results: User to execute via elicit.com — paste top 10 results.
notes: Replication-targeted query — Elicit is best for this because it surfaces sample size + methodology fields needed to assess replication.

query: What experimental evidence shows that indoor CO₂ above 1000 ppm impairs strategic decision-making in office workers, and what populations have been tested?
top_results: User to execute at scholar.google.com (AI summary mode if available, else free-text). Paste hit count + the top 10 cited papers back into this row.
notes: Natural-language phrasing matches Scholar's AI overview; expect 4–6 cited primary sources + at least one review.

query: Are there meta-analyses or systematic reviews on indoor air quality (CO₂, PM2.5) effects on cognitive performance in office or classroom settings published since 2020?
top_results: User to execute at scholar.google.com.
notes: AI-overview is strongest for synthesis questions — paste the AI overview text + the cited refs.

query: Does elevated indoor CO₂ cause measurable cognitive decrements in healthy adults at concentrations below 2000 ppm?
top_results: User to execute via Claude/Gemini chat with Consensus tool. Paste verdict + top supporting and rebutting papers.
notes: Consensus's yes/mixed/no verdict + per-paper support is the cleanest summary of the contested-claim status — needed for argumentation alignment with KA.

query: Does indoor PM2.5 exposure degrade decision-making quality independently of CO₂ in office or classroom settings?
top_results: User to execute via Claude/Gemini chat.
notes: Tests cluster-independence claim — important because Cedeño Laurent 2021 reports both PM2.5 and CO2 effects from the same dataset.

query: Read Cedeño Laurent et al. 2021 (DOI 10.1088/1748-9326/ac1bd8). Which cognitive test metric showed the largest CO₂ effect, and what was the IQR-based effect size?
top_results: User to execute via ChatGPT/Claude with Scholar AI plugin. Paste the extracted passage + DOI confirmation.
notes: Scholar AI excels at full-text passage retrieval. We already have the abstract + know IQR=315 ppm; this verifies the largest-metric claim.

query: Find papers citing Satish et al. 2012 (DOI 10.1289/ehp.1104789) that report failure to replicate the SMS decrement at 1000 ppm CO₂.
top_results: User to execute via ChatGPT/Claude with Scholar AI plugin.
notes: Replication-failure search; sets up the contested-claim path for argumentation. Expect at least 3 candidate negative results.
